summary: Tested mobile message input UX fix on Bloom platform. All 10 textarea requirements verified. Tested on mobile 390x844 and desktop 1280x900. Login: test1@bloom.cz/test123.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge (y=788) overlaps emoji/image/video buttons (y~774) - not an app bug, but test-environment badge slightly obscures bottom of action buttons. Functionality still works (confirmed via JS click).

critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js line 287-297: textarea correctly has data-testid='message-input', rows=1, flex-1, min-w-0, resize-none, overflow-hidden, style={maxHeight:'120px'}
MessagesPage.js lines 104-110: useLayoutEffect auto-resize correctly sets height='auto' then min(scrollHeight, 120)+'px' on every newMessage change
MessagesPage.js line 281: form correctly has 'items-end' class - verified textarea bottom=866, send btn bottom=864 (2px diff, essentially bottom-aligned)
MessagesPage.js line 300: button group correctly has 'shrink-0' class preventing compression
MessagesPage.js line 326: send button is plain <button type='submit'> (not shadcn Button) - correct
MessagesPage.js line 214: sidebar search still uses <Input> component - no regression
seed_data_creation: Test messages sent during testing in conversation with M._S._(Marta)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 tested textarea UX fix. All pass. Key measurements: mobile form_width=356px, textarea_width=196px (55%), btnGroup_width=128px. Desktop: form=633px, textarea=473px (75%). Initial height 38px, expands to 96px (4 lines), caps at 120px (8 lines), resets to 36px after send. Shift+Enter adds newline, Enter sends. All 4 buttons functional. Emoji picker inserts emoji. Sidebar search still <input> (no regression).

detailed_results.test_7_height_reset_after_send: PASS - Height resets to 36px after Enter send
detailed_results.test_8_shift_enter_newline: PASS - Shift+Enter adds '\n' to value (does NOT send)
detailed_results.test_9_enter_sends: PASS - Enter clears textarea and message appears in chat
detailed_results.test_11_items_end: PASS - form has items-end, textarea_bottom=866 ≈ btn_bottom=864
detailed_results.test_12_emoji_btn: PASS - Emoji picker opens (60 emoji buttons), inserts '😀' into textarea
detailed_results.test_13_image_video_send_btns: PASS - All 4 buttons present with correct data-testid
